title: corion rubrum
intro: Corion rubrum, commonly known as Red Coral Plant, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include a range of health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The therapeutic actions of Corion rubrum include wound healing, pain relief, and the treatment of various skin conditions. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic compounds, which contribute to its therapeutic properties.
